required_evidence: ci_green: all tests pass on ubuntu-latest and windows-latest
test_result: 56 existing tests pass, new governance tests pass
review_result: independent reviewer approved at head_sha
rollback_declaration: revert enforcement commits; contracts remain version-controlled

rollback.procedure: git revert the enforcement commits; governance contracts remain version-controlled and no persistent migration is required

tenth_man_countercase: Automating policy checks can create ceremonial compliance while still validating an incomplete mission or weak evidence. The validator must report what it can and cannot prove, preserve human escalation, and never treat schema validity as mission correctness.
